mapper.sql: SELECT data_id, grid_code, indicator_code, indicator_value, create_time FROM jw_grid_data_raw
mapper.select: SELECT d.data_id, d.grid_code, d.indicator_code, d.indicator_value, d.create_time FROM jw_grid_data_raw d JOIN jw_grid_meta m ON d.grid_code = m.grid_code WHERE m.city = #{city} ORDER BY d.grid_code, d.indicator_code

SELECT d.data_id, d.grid_code, d.indicator_code, d.indicator_value, d.create_time FROM jw_grid_data_raw d JOIN jw_grid_meta m ON d.grid_code = m.grid_code WHERE m.city = #{city} ORDER BY d.grid_code, d.indicator_code
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_data_raw WHERE data_id IN
#{id}
DELETE FROM jw_grid_data_raw WHERE grid_code IN (SELECT grid_code FROM jw_grid_meta WHERE city = #{city})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_data_raw ( grid_code, indicator_code, indicator_value, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.gridCode}, #{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.indicatorValue}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE jw_grid_data_raw SET indicator_code = #{newCode} WHERE indicator_code = #{oldCode}
